input.title: Drag-and-drop snapshot tests
input.body: Add puppeteer snapshot tests that cover the position of various drag and drop elements. There are two test flags that can be enabled to simulate a drag-and-drop. - `simulateDrag` - Simulates a drag in progress by rendering the blue lines that indicates where the thought will be inserted on drop (See: DropHover.tsx). - `simulateDrop` - Renders the valid areas that a thought can be dropped as color blocks (See: DropUncle.tsx, DropChild.tsx, DropEnd.tsx). For example, with `simulateDrop` enabled: Test flags can be enabled in tests by setting `window.em.testFlags.simulateDrag` or `window.em.testFlags.simulateDrop` and triggering a re-render. ## Subtasks - [x] a. Verify testFlags functionality in browser - [x] b. Verify puppeteer snapshot tests on local machine - [x] c. Add testHelpers method to force re-render from puppeteer test - Create drag tests: - [x] d. [DragAndDropThought](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DragAndDropThought.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z). - [x] e. [DropEnd](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropEnd.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z) - [x] f. [DropChild](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropChild.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z) - [x] g. [DropUncle](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropUncle.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z) - Create drop tests: - [x] h. [DragAndDropThought](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DragAndDropThought.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z). - [x] i. [DropEnd](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropEnd.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z) - [x] j. [DropChild](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropChild.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z) - [x] k. [DropUncle](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/blob/main/src/components/DropUncle.tsx?rgh-link-date=2024-05-15T20%3A00%3A37Z)
